headline: Eaton (ETN) Names New Energy Infrastructure Chief as Demand Accelerates
summary: With a short percentage of shares outstanding at 2.43%, Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) is among the 7 Best Electrical Equipment Stocks to Buy. On July 8, Eaton Corporation plc (NYSE:ETN) announced the appointment of Dan Simpson as President of Global Energy Infrastructure Solutions. headline: Earn 8.6% On EMR Stock By Selling Upside You Might Not Miss
summary: Get paid a guaranteed cash income on your Emerson Electric shares now, which you keep no matter what, just for agreeing to sell at a higher price if the stock gets there.

headline: 3 Stocks Riding the AI Data Center Power Buildout in July
summary: The biggest constraint on AI data centers right now has nothing to do with chips, and three industrial stocks are quietly capturing the earnings surge that constraint is creating.
